audit_items.proof_trace: s_entered is set to true at line 418 unconditionally before any external interactions (safeTransfer at 444, auctionCallback at 449, safeTransferFrom at 453). The check at line 415 is the sole entry point for the external bid() function and fires on every invocation. Any re-entrant call during external interactions will find s_entered == true and revert; if any external call reverts the EVM rolls back the storage write, preventing a stuck lock.
